title: Glowberry Delight
description: Adds Farmers Delight support to Glowberry Expansion along with more foods.
body:
Glowberry delight is a Farmers delight addition that adds Farmers delight compatablity with Glowberry Expansion. It adds six new foods, three new ingredients, and one new feast.

Foods
![foods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dfbcc662a95ddb977ccd89b8997a82c9279292e.png)

The feast
